string.text:
Improves fast-travel sneak odds, increases ambush spawn distance, and reduces hunger, thirst, and sleep costs while traveling.
 
Levels are gained by sneaking past threats during travel and completing sneak journeys.
$clr_green• $clr_whiteFast-travel sneak bonus improved\n$clr_cyan• $clr_whiteAmbush spawn distance increased\n$clr_cyan• $clr_whiteTravel resource costs reduced
